title: CVE-2026-5104 - Totolink A3300R cstecgi.cgi setStaticRoute command injection

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 - CVE-2026-5104 - Totolink A3300R cstecgi.cgi setStaticRoute c
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX

    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*cstecgi.cgi*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
